title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
